world.title: Chinese Nickel Tycoon Taps Top Global Traders for Aluminum Push
world.description: A Chinese tycoon who helped transform Indonesia’s metals industry over the past decade is in talks with commodity trading giants Mercuria Energy Group, Glencore Plc and Trafigura Group to secure investments in his new, $3 billion aluminum smelter.

climate.title: Toxic dust from the shrinking Salton Sea is harming children’s lung growth amid water loss, study finds
climate.description: A new study shows that toxic dust from Southern California’s shrinking Salton Sea impedes lung development in children, as water loss and industrial expansion reshape the region’s environment.

conflict.title: Families across Sudan endure years of displacement, hunger, loss
conflict.description: More than nine million people remain displaced in Sudan, while nearly 29 million face acute hunger.

conflict.title: Norway’s Crude Exports Hit Record Value as Oil Price Soared
conflict.description: Norway’s crude exports surged to a record by value last month due to the outbreak of the war in the Middle East, helping to raise the country’s trade surplus to the highest level in more than three years.
